title: Official MCP registry auth: namespace com.kage-core requires domain kage-core.com, JWT expires fast
summary: mcp publisher HTTP auth for namespace com.kage core/kage must use domain kage core.com NOT kage core.github.io — apex github.io 404s the well known file . Proof file lives at https://kage core.com/.well known/mcp registr
body: mcp-publisher HTTP auth for namespace com.kage-core/kage must use -domain kage-core.com (NOT kage-core.github.io — apex github.io 404s the well-known file). Proof file lives at https://kage-core.com/.well-known/mcp-registry-auth (200). Login: mcp-publisher login http -domain kage-core.com -private-key $(tr -d '[:space:]' < /tmp/mcp-pub/priv.hex). Registry JWTs expire within hours — always re-login before publish. Publish: cd mcp && mcp-publisher publish (reads server.json; bump both version fields first).

stale_reasons: linked path changed since memory was verified: mcp/server.json
